title: Fix docker login issue in travis.yml
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

docker login in Travis is now apparently asking for a y/n verification if the --password param is passed in.  This PR will fix that issue.

comments.body: OK, latest patch seems to have gotten past the docker login issue.  Fingers crossed for the rest of the tests.
Green Test buttons.  @rhatdan or @nalind can you review and if appropriate merge ASAP.  This is blocking the builds.

:pushpin: Commit 7e15329 has been approved by `nalind`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=nalind 7e15329a1e3614bea62708c4d0740297aa2cc49f -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
